items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.8 mph at a -18.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Philadelphia Phillies, KC 1, PHI 6. Michael Wacha led the night, working 6.0 innings with 4 earned runs, 7 strikeouts and 1 walk. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.8 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Phillies Recap
